known_asset_targets.description: Codex minimum version requirement across the packaged and release-backed team toolset assets.

setup_contract: Inventory the target capability before mutating any asset files.
Use platform-cli/release-assets/content_index/content-index.json as the repo-owned source of truth for release-backed capability entries.
Use platform-cli/release-assets/catalog/*.json as the repo-owned bundle contract catalog for release-backed capability packaging and publication.
Use .ghdp/capability-allowlist.json as the repo-owned source of truth for marketplace capability entries.
Treat release-backed assets as manifest/index/tag aware, even when the current repo edit only changes local source files.
For release-backed operations, build a real content-manifest.json bundle from repo source files and optionally publish it with gh before refreshing content-index-latest.
Treat marketplace-backed assets as allowlist and repo-snapshot aware.
Prefer the lightweight asset lifecycle path when the user is revising existing asset content without broader code behavior changes.
